Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 75 

SPIBIF_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Spina Bifida and Other Congenital Anomalies of the Nervous System First Ever Occurrence Date — 
Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the spina bifida and other 
congenital anomalies of the nervous system indicator. The variable will be
